links.context: The angel, lifting his hand in the form for taking an oath (see [[GEN.14:22]]; [[DAN.12:7]]),
frequently used in localities where non-Jews abound (see [[GEN.14:19]]-22; [[DAN.3:26]]; [[MRK.5:7]]; [[LUK.8:28]]; [[ACT.16:17]]).
In imitation of Abraham ([[GEN.14:22]], [[GEN.14:23]]), and Elisha ([[2KI.5:16]]), Judith took nothing
